d: Fay selects a direction and casts vitality magic to frontal allies within a 3-tile arc, restoring [[300%]]<ATK> HP and increasing their ATK by [[12%]] for [[8]]s.
Increases effect duration to [[9]]s.
Increases the ATK of allies within range by [[14%]].
Increases the ATK SPD of allies within range by [[15]].
Increases effect duration to [[10]]s.
Fay heals the [[weakest]] allied hero, restoring [[50%]]<ATK> HP per second for [[4]]s.
Increases HP restored per second to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP restored per second to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP restored per second to [[65%]]<ATK>.
Fay smacks a gem at an enemy. She causes an explosion when the skill hits, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies and restoring [[150%]]<ATK> HP to all allies within range.
Increase damage to [[155%]]<ATK> and HP restored to [[155%]]<ATK>.

The gem has 2 forms and 2 different buffs. It becomes a ruby if the target deals physical damage, reducing enemies' Phys DEF by [[10%]] and increasing allies' Phys DEF by [[10%]] for [[5]]s. It becomes a Sapphire if the target deals magic damage, reducing enemies' Magic DEF by [[10%]] and increasing allies' Magic DEF by [[10%]] for [[5]]s.
Increase damage to [[160%]]<ATK> and HP restored to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP by [[17%]] during battle.
Increases HP by [[23%]] during battle.
Increases HP by [[29%]] during battle.
Fay grants the buffs of Vibrant Dance and Healing Gemstones on the allied hero deployed [[1 tile in front]] when a battle starts.
Also increases the allied hero's Vitality by [[15]] till the end of a battle.
Increases the allied hero's Vitality by [[20]].
Increases the allied hero's Vitality by [[25]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: When an ally's HP ratio drops below [[50%]] for the first time during Healing Gemstones takes effect, Fay heals the ally by [[200%]]<ATK> HP. This effect can only be triggered once each time this skill is used.
